name: The 9 Glory Gods - JJBA
description:
the “elite” members of Dio’s army

~ JJBA Stardust Crusaders ~

N’Doul, Mariah, Alessi, Oingo and the D’Arby brothers

Does NOT include Boingo, Anubis and Pet Shop!! (for obvious reasons) I wanted to add Anubis though I wasn’t too sure how

Credit to the Jojo wiki for the info/details on the characters!!

Set your tokens to unlimited - otherwise this bot will NOT work!

Please lmk if there are any problems with this bot! ☺️ It acts weird sometimes but I’m trying to fix it the best I can :3
